Ayo! Sorry for the little hiatus! And HAPPY NEW YEAR PEEPS🥳 Hopefully 2025 wont be as much of a shitstorm as the last 4+ years have been. Anyway, may this year bring me more fictional men for me to simp for 🙂‍↕️🙏 (maybe I’ll do characters from Nocturne next since season 2 is coming out soon ;)

Alas, I’ve come to announce that I have made yet another bot of this handsome fella🫠 (totally not imported from c.ai just so I can do the boombayah and peg him LOL)

Hey there! I’m still learning how to master the arts of this craft, so go easy on me. If there’s any mistakes or edits I need to make, PLEASE let me know in the reviews. ✿
